column1: PAYROLL HOURS ENTRY - Garderie La Belle Academie Inc.
1. Enter hours in YELLOW columns only (Regular, Holiday, Vacation, Special $, Maternity)
2. Regular = standard work hours | Holiday = statutory holidays | Vacation = vacation days taken
3. Special $ = one-time bonuses/tips/special payments | Maternity = maternity leave hours
5. When done, notify the administrator to download and process
6. DO NOT modify Code, Name, Department, Occupation, or Rate columns
To import into payroll system: Download this sheet as CSV > Open payroll app > New Period > Import Hours from CSV
